_comment: PA Design App — Knowledge Base Device Record Schema v1.0

part_number.description: Exact manufacturer part number as printed on device / datasheet

manufacturer.description: Company name (Ampleon, NXP, Wolfspeed, MACOM, Sumitomo, Freescale, Qorvo, etc.)

family.description: Product family identifier (e.g. BLF, CLF, CGHV, PTVA, MRF)

series.description: More specific grouping within a family (e.g. BLF7G22, CLF1G0)

package.description: Package type (e.g. MOS-10, LFPAK56, SOT539, air-cavity, QFN)

freq_test_mhz.description: Frequency at which datasheet performance is specified

pout_dbm.description: Output power in dBm (computed from pout_w_cw if available, else pout_w_pulse)

gain_db.description: Large-signal power gain at rated output and test frequency

ropt_ohm.description: Real part of optimum load impedance (from load-pull or datasheet matching data)

xopt_ohm.description: Imaginary part of optimum load impedance (inductive positive)

rin_ohm.description: Real part of input impedance at test frequency

xin_ohm.description: Imaginary part of input impedance at test frequency

impedance_ref_plane.description: Reference plane for impedance data (package_lead, internal, fixture_ref, 50ohm_ref)

application.description: Application segments: cellular, broadcast, ism, avionics, defense, medical, satellite, radar, wlan

use_case.description: Specific use cases: 4G, 5G, LTE, SSR, TACAN, IFF, DME, FM-broadcast, DAB, ISM-13.56, plasma, MRI, Doherty-main, Doherty-peak

role.description: Typical role in a PA chain: driver / main / peak / combined

topology.description: Supported amplifier topologies: single-ended, push-pull, Doherty, balanced, Chireix, load-modulated

datasheet_url.description: URL to manufacturer datasheet or product page

knowledge_source.description: Origin of the data in this record

knowledge_confidence.description: Confidence level. 'high' = verified against datasheet. 'medium' = from reliable training knowledge. 'low' = placeholder / inferred.

tags.description: Free-form searchable tags from the tag taxonomy

notes.description: Free-form engineering notes and design hints
